name: CometCloud AI
description: AI-curated crypto Fund-of-Funds intelligence platform. CIS (CometCloud Intelligence Score) provides 5-pillar cross-asset scoring for 85+ crypto and TradFi assets. Built for human institutional investors and autonomous AI agents equally. Signals use positioning-only language per Hong Kong SFC compliance requirements.

macro_pulse.description: Real-time macro regime detection, BTC price, Fear & Greed Index

signal_feed.description: Compliance-safe positioning signals from 7 concurrent data sources

agent_api.description: Machine-readable CIS scores optimized for agent consumption

authenticated_endpoints.note: Pro tier API key required for score history, backtests, and higher rate limits

compliance.regulatory_note: CometCloud AI does not hold an SFC Type 4 or Type 9 license. All signals use positioning language only (OUTPERFORM/NEUTRAL/UNDERPERFORM). Not investment advice.
compliance.signal_standard: SFC-compliant positioning language — no transactional recommendations
